Home › Lake County › Eustis › MCDONALD'S #2447
A 90

MCDONALD'S #2447

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: February 25, 2026

Is MCDONALD'S #2447 a safe place to eat? Yes — an A grade, 90/100, at its most recent inspection on February 25, 2026. That visit logged 1 intermediate and 7 basic violations.

On health score it's safer than 61% of Lake County restaurants we grade. Diners rate it 3.4 from 2,372 reviews.

Get directions Call (352) 357-5588

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. February 25, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 7 basic

    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 25 — Single-service and single-use items
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×3)
